lever_summary: Arena/scratch reuse for batched SVD (A=U S Vt via eigendecomposition of AtA). svd_decompose_matrix allocated ~8 buffers/slice (ata, Jacobi eigenvalues+eigenvectors, indices, sigma, v_sorted, u, u_out, vt). Now all live in an SvdScratch reused across the batch; reuses jacobi_eigendecomposition_matrix_into (the existing reused-buffer Jacobi) and removes the now-dead allocating wrapper. Arithmetic unchanged.
method: Same-worker A/B normalized by vmap_eigh (untouched) as worker-speed calibration; candidate and stashed-baseline ran on different-speed workers, normalized via in-process svd/eigh ratio.

change.lever: Added SvdScratch {jacobi, ata, indices, sigma, v_sorted, u, u_out, vt}; svd_decompose_matrix takes &mut SvdScratch, clears+reuses each buffer, writes U/sigma/Vt into u_out/sigma/vt; batch_svd_multi allocates one SvdScratch before the loop. Derived Default on JacobiScratch; removed the unused jacobi_eigendecomposition_matrix allocating wrapper.

isomorphism.arithmetic: identical AtA, Jacobi eigendecomposition, descending total_cmp sort, sigma/U/Vt formulas + thresholds; only allocation strategy changed

validation.name: svd_and_full_suite
validation.result: 256 + 55 passed incl all test_batch_trace_svd_multi_* (assert exact U/sigma/Vt)

validation.name: clippy_deny_warnings
validation.command: rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-dispatch --release --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings

note: 1.29x (worker-corrected) — weaker than pass92 QR (1.46x) because for 3x2 SVD the Jacobi eigensolve + output Literal conversion dominate over allocation. This COMPLETES the batched-linalg arena vein (eigh EighScratch / QR pass92 / SVD pass93). Diminishing returns on the arena lever => the next batched-linalg swing is ALGORITHMIC (closed-form/blocked small-matrix solvers), filed as frankenjax-* on the parity-revalidation track, NOT more arena tuning.
